counterparty.name: Dana Okonkwo-Reyes
counterparty.style: Warm for exactly four minutes, then granite. Uses silence as a crowbar. Concedes only against numbers, never against charm.

world.public_brief: You run accounts at a logistics-analytics SaaS. Meridian Freight — 18% of your ARR at $240k/yr — is up for renewal in three weeks. Their new VP Procurement has opened with: a competitor quote 'around $150k', a demand for a 3-year price lock, and a hard note that your two Q1 outages 'were noticed upstairs.' Your goals: renew at $210k+ per year, no lock longer than 2 years, and get the expansion conversation (their new EU lanes) on the calendar.

hidden.batna: The competitor quote is real but their board hates migration risk after a botched TMS switch in 2024 — moving costs them ~$95k and two quarters of pain they cannot afford before peak season.
hidden.walkaway: $185k/yr — below that Dana takes the migration pain. Above $205k she needs a story for her CFO; the story she can sell is 'we got the SLA teeth and the EU lanes priced in.'
pressures: Peak season starts in 9 weeks and a migration before it is career risk for Dana personally
Her CFO privately wants ONE analytics vendor across the merged fleet — consolidation with YOU is on her slide 7, not elimination
hidden.tells: She checks her second phone when migration timing is mentioned. Her sentences get shorter when the EU lanes come up — that's the thing she actually needs.

world.optimum: Close at $215-225k/yr, 2-year term, SLA credits clause (costs you little, gives her the CFO story), EU-lane pilot scoped as paid expansion — using the migration-before-peak-season squeeze and the consolidation agenda she never states.

rules.attempts: Best score counts; unlimited attempts; each submission must be a genuinely played session.
rules.honor: The hidden state is technically readable in this file — the Season runs on honor, transcripts are public, and metagamed sessions are obvious to readers. Play it straight; the leaderboard links every replay.
rules.scoring: The Gym's standard debrief: /40 across value captured, information gained, concession discipline, and reading the tells.
rules.submit: Play at season.html → copy your submission block → PR adding it to seasons/leaderboard-1.json. CI validates shape + attestation. Name = your GitHub handle.
